rules.L-prior: num_tool_calls==0 OR no queried entity in question
rules.L-comp: >=2 tool calls AND later entity not in prior responses/question
rules.L-lang: default; typically non-empty responses but triple not in gold kg_path

L-prior.commentary: Model skipped or mis-aimed tool use (no question entity in any query); relies on parametric prior.

L-sig.commentary: Tool channel returned empty/error responses >=50% of the time; answer could not be grounded in retrieved evidence.

L-comp.commentary: Chain broke across turns: a later search entity was not in any prior tool response nor the question (state-carrying failure).

L-lang.commentary: Tool responses were non-empty but (entity, relation) did not match the gold kg_path triples — schema/string-format mismatch or wrong relation.
